# Security Policy

Thank you for taking the time and interest to improve the security of Pluto.jl! Here is some information from us, but always free to reach out.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest minor version will receive security updates. 

## Reporting a Vulnerability

To report a security vulnerability, please open a new [Security advisory](https://github.com/JuliaPluto/Pluto.jl/security/advisories/new) with your findings. Try to write a detailed report, with simple examples. We will try our best to address your advisory as quickly as possible. 

Please use this feature to report security issues privately, and do not post security issues publicly in forums, our issues, etc. Do not publish or reveal the problem until it has been resolved.
